Name: Jumper Wires & Breadboard Kit
Purpose: Necessary for prototyping the physical connections between the FPGA, the logic analyzer, and external peripherals.

Name: 0.96" OLED Display (SPI/I2C)
Purpose: eripheral for the LX32 SoC. Will be used to develop the first hardware drivers and display system status directly from the CPU.

Name: Digital Logic Analyzer (8CH/24MHz)
Purpose: Essential for hardware debugging. Used to capture and analyze high-speed digital signals from the FPGA pins to verify instruction execution cycles.

Name: Sipeed Tang Primer 20K Dock Kit
Purpose: Primary FPGA development board for physical hardware synthesis of the LX32 core. Required to move from simulation to real-world RTL verification.
